purpose: Diagnostic pseudo-labeling of competition test images for comparison with an existing DINOv3 submission. These outputs are not ground truth and are not an automatic submission.

0.name: Recyclable
0.definition: Non-electronic discarded items whose primary visible waste identity is recyclable material or packaging, such as paper, cardboard, plastic, glass, or metal.

1.name: Electronic
1.definition: Electrical or electronic devices, appliances, accessories, components, cables, circuit-containing objects, batteries, and similar e-waste.

2.name: Organic
2.definition: Food, plants, biological material, and other visibly biodegradable organic waste.

decision_rules: Use the primary discarded object rather than background decorations or incidental objects.
If an object clearly contains electronic or electrical components, prefer Electronic unless the official competition taxonomy says otherwise.
If the image clearly depicts food, plant, or biological waste without a conflicting packaging convention, prefer Organic.
If the image is primarily non-electronic recyclable material or empty packaging, prefer Recyclable.
If food or organic contents and recyclable packaging are both central and the competition convention is unclear, return no label and mark taxonomy ambiguity.
If multiple objects from different classes are present, return no label unless one primary waste item is unambiguous.
Advertisements, illustrations, screenshots, product catalog images, and unusually clean retail photos should be marked ambiguous when their waste category is not visually reliable.
Model confidence is advisory and must not be treated as a calibrated probability.
safeguards: Run this pipeline only after confirming that the competition rules permit external pretrained VLM inference on test images.
Do not provide the existing DINOv3 submission label to Moondream during inference.
Do not use test images or Moondream test predictions for training, fine-tuning, threshold optimization, class-bias fitting, or model selection.
Do not interpret agreement with Moondream as test accuracy.
Do not automatically replace DINOv3 predictions or create an official submission from these pseudo-labels.
Preserve all prompts, raw responses, model identifiers, and comparison outputs for auditability.
